questions.question:
An application executes \( 6.4 \times 10^{8} \) number of instructions in \( 6.3 \) seconds. There are four types of instructions, the details of which are given in the table. The duration of a clock cycle in nanoseconds is __________. (rounded off to one decimal place)

\[ \begin{array}{|c|c|c|} \hline
\text{Instruction type} & \text{Clock cycles required per} \\& \text{instruction (CPI)} & \text{Number of instructions executed} \\
\hline
\text{Branch} & \text{2} & \text{\( 2.25 \times 10^{8} \)}  \\  \hline
\text{Load} & \text{5} & \text{\( 1.20 \times 10^{8} \)}  \\  \hline
\text{Store} & \text{4} & \text{\( 1.65 \times 10^{8} \)}  \\  \hline
\text{Arithmetic} & \text{3} & \text{\( 1.30 \times 10^{8} \)}  \\ \hline
\end{array} \]


GATE CSE 2025 | Set 2 | Question: 51
